final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media cover image for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) personal creator account.

Style/medium: playful, approachable personal creator aesthetic, cute hand-drawn illustration mixed with lifestyle photography, soft organic shapes
Composition: centered product hero shot within a 9-grid layout frame, vertical format optimized for mobile feed
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld gimbal camera as the hero product, slightly angled to show the screen and lens
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal background with subtle lifestyle elements suggesting travel or vlogging, soft blur
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight, soft and inviting, friendly approachable mood
Color palette: warm pastel tones as base, clean white/silver from product as anchor, soft accent colors for visual interest
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: text must be cute and differentiated from standard fonts, hand-drawn or rounded bubbly letterforms preferred, must read clearly at thumbnail size
Avoid: corporate sterile look, generic stock photo aesthetic, overly polished commercial photography, harsh shadows, cluttered background, standard system fonts
